programme.title: Ugliest House in America
programme.desc: Comedian and actress Retta check out a property that feels like the Titanic inside and out, an angled mess of a house with no walls and zero privacy, and a gigantic green box with a nasty backyard.

programme.title: Ugliest House in America
programme.desc: Retta heads out into the desert to visit a broken-down cabin with a cat problem, a dust-filled dome and a home stuck in the '70S.

programme.title: Building Alaska
programme.desc: Jackie's team delivers French Doors to find the frame fits incorrectly. A snow machine delivery runs into problems on the melted trail at the Hill's build site. Meanwhile, Kyle slips and falls while installing windows.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous
programme.desc: A movie-loving couple wants to turn their builder-grade house into a customized home that reflects both their styles.

programme.title: The Block: Fans v Faves
programme.desc: Work continues on the week one rooms and Keith gives the teams a near impossible 24 hour deadline. The contestants quickly realise they need to keep the big picture in mind and some go shopping for their kitchens.

programme.title: Ugliest House in America
programme.desc: Retta takes an ugly hunt up and down the Pacific coast as she gets a tour of a linoleum-covered nightmare, a house with a staircase to hell and an oppressively hot home with a huge built-in solarium.

programme.title: Ugliest House in America
programme.desc: Among America's majestic mountains, comedian and actress Retta finds three ugly homes ready for a makeover.

programme.title: Christina on the Coast
programme.desc: After a successful kitchen renovation, Christina returns to design a couple's bathroom. This time, Christina must balance the couple's differing styles.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: Returning to Roots in Cairns, Australia
programme.desc: An Oregon couple looks to reconnect with family and give their kids a chance to live abroad in Cairns, Australia.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: Brits Buying in the Jungles of Costa Rica
programme.desc: After globe-trotting for four years, a couple looks to put down roots in Costa Rica. They're searching for a starter home, despite a lengthy wish list and plumbing problems.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: A family looks to relocate from Washington and searches for a home in sunny Florida. She wants a place that's move-in ready, but he's not willing to let go of his drive for quirky projects.

programme.title: Masters of Flip
programme.desc: Kortney and Dave's latest flip serves as the training ground for their newest team member Kevin, who also happens to be Kortney's little brother. Will he be able to rise to the occasion?

programme.title: Small Town Potential
programme.sub-title: The Art of the House Search
programme.desc: Davina and Kristin turn an engaged couple's new house into a work of art.

programme.title: 100 Day Hotel Challenge
programme.desc: With both hotels lacking amenities, Brian and Mika Kleinschmidt are taking the competition outdoors, creating outdoor lounge areas and bringing in guest all-star designers.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: Dreaming of a Suite Life by the Beach in Lusby, MD
programme.desc: After finding their dream beach house, a Virginia couple reworks the floor plan to create an expanded primary suite.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: Returning to Roots in Cairns, Australia
programme.desc: An Oregon couple looks to reconnect with family and give their kids a chance to live abroad in Cairns, Australia.

programme.desc: After globe-trotting for four years, a couple looks to put down roots in Costa Rica. They're searching for a starter home, despite a lengthy wish list and plumbing problems.

programme.desc: Among America's majestic mountains, comedian and actress Retta finds three ugly homes ready for a makeover.

programme.sub-title: Brits Buying in the Jungles of Costa Rica
programme.desc: After globe-trotting for four years, a couple looks to put down roots in Costa Rica. They're searching for a starter home, despite a lengthy wish list and plumbing problems.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: A family looks to relocate from Washington and searches for a home in sunny Florida. She wants a place that's move-in ready, but he's not willing to let go of his drive for quirky projects.

programme.title: Epic Builds
programme.desc: Builders attempt to deliver a luxury home to the top of a mountain, hauling massive modules up a steep, single-lane dirt road where one mistake could bring the entire project to a standstill.

programme.title: The Garden Gurus
programme.desc: The gurus look at some fantastic ideas for your autumn tidy up, we find some cute dwarf trees, and tell you our secrets to gardening success.

programme.title: The Block: Fans v Faves
programme.desc: Work continues on the week one rooms and Keith gives the teams a near impossible 24 hour deadline. The contestants quickly realise they need to keep the big picture in mind and some go shopping for their kitchens.

programme.sub-title: Returning to Roots in Cairns, Australia
programme.desc: An Oregon couple looks to reconnect with family and give their kids a chance to live abroad in Cairns, Australia.

programme.sub-title: Brits Buying in the Jungles of Costa Rica

programme.desc: A family looks to relocate from Washington and searches for a home in sunny Florida. She wants a place that's move-in ready, but he's not willing to let go of his drive for quirky projects.

programme.title: Ugliest House in America
programme.desc: Retta takes an ugly hunt up and down the Pacific coast as she gets a tour of a linoleum-covered nightmare, a house with a staircase to hell and an oppressively hot home with a huge built-in solarium.

programme.title: Ugliest House in America
programme.desc: Among America's majestic mountains, comedian and actress Retta finds three ugly homes ready for a makeover.

programme.title: Masters of Flip
programme.desc: Kortney and Dave's latest flip serves as the training ground for their newest team member Kevin, who also happens to be Kortney's little brother. Will he be able to rise to the occasion?

programme.title: 100 Day Hotel Challenge
programme.desc: With both hotels lacking amenities, Brian and Mika Kleinschmidt are taking the competition outdoors, creating outdoor lounge areas and bringing in guest all-star designers.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: Dreaming of a Suite Life by the Beach in Lusby, MD
programme.desc: After finding their dream beach house, a Virginia couple reworks the floor plan to create an expanded primary suite.

programme.title: The Block: Fans v Faves
programme.desc: The contestants need to design and create bedside lamps and a floor lamp that must be used in their week one room.

programme.title: Ugliest House in America
programme.desc: After a coast-to-coast search, Retta announces which ugly-in-paradise home receives a $150,000 makeover.

programme.title: Small Town Potential
programme.sub-title: The Art of the House Search
programme.desc: Davina and Kristin turn an engaged couple's new house into a work of art.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: A cost engineer from South Africa fulfills a lifelong dream to live abroad while advancing her career in Cambridgeshire, England.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: A Scholarship and Culture Clashes in London
programme.desc: An academic and her partner embrace opportunity and cultural change as they relocate to pursue her Ph.D. in London.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: A couple looks to set down roots in New Jersey. They're searching for a large house to raise future kids, but he wants land in the country while she wants a neighbourhood setting.

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: Terry and Ashley have a battle with nature as they try to get their garden - abandoned for 100 years - under control; May and Guy race to transform a terrace in 24 hours, Sarah and George get the party started.

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Armed with a new toy - a metal detector primed for unearthing hidden treasure - the family head outside to see if the Chateau's grounds have any secrets to share.

programme.title: Renovation Nation
programme.desc: In Cornwall, interior designer Anouska and Greig create a basement cinema room. Rosi and Antony attempt to transport 300 tonnes of salvaged items to their Scottish farmhouse.

programme.title: Alan Cummings: Paradise Homes
programme.desc: Alan returns to his rugged roots of the Scottish Highlands to visit and extraordinary hidden nature getaway and tours an eccentric family home built above a cave with intricate space-saving details.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: A cost engineer from South Africa fulfills a lifelong dream to live abroad while advancing her career in Cambridgeshire, England.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: A Scholarship and Culture Clashes in London
programme.desc: An academic and her partner embrace opportunity and cultural change as they relocate to pursue her Ph.D. in London.

programme.desc: A couple looks to set down roots in New Jersey. They're searching for a large house to raise future kids, but he wants land in the country while she wants a neighbourhood setting.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: A couple looks to set down roots in New Jersey. They're searching for a large house to raise future kids, but he wants land in the country while she wants a neighbourhood setting.

programme.title: House Hunters: Cabin Dreams
programme.desc: Partners and their two dogs leave Cape Cod for a cabin in Norway, Maine, searching for a waterfront property. One is a contractor open to renovations, while the other wants a newer build.

programme.title: House Hunters: Cabin Dreams
programme.sub-title: From Dry Desert to Cooler Climes in Arizona
programme.desc: A family and their two dogs are leaving Tucson for a cabin in Mt. Lemmon. They want their kids to explore the forest, she needs to commute to work, and he hopes to get a deck while working from home.

programme.title: The Garden Gurus
programme.desc: Join the gurus as they show you around a beautiful garden in New Zealand and take you on a tour of the Melbourne International Flower and Garden Show.

programme.title: The Block: Fans v Faves
programme.desc: The contestants need to design and create bedside lamps and a floor lamp that must be used in their week one room.

programme.desc: A cost engineer from South Africa fulfills a lifelong dream to live abroad while advancing her career in Cambridgeshire, England.

programme.desc: An academic and her partner embrace opportunity and cultural change as they relocate to pursue her Ph.D. in London.

programme.title: Australia's Best Pools
programme.desc: A reno project that delivers style, safety and fun in Sydney, something new and different a pool for ... dogs and on the waterfront of one of Australia's best beaches sits this acclaimed architect's latest pool.

programme.desc: After a coast-to-coast search, Retta announces which ugly-in-paradise home receives a $150,000 makeover.
